metadata.name: skip-django-pymess
metadata.summary: Pymess is a Django framework for sending messages

documentation: Documentation you can find [here](http://django-pymess.readthedocs.org/)

functions.name: pymess.templatetags.pymess.check_tag_arguments
documentation:
Decorator that checks that all arguments of a simple tag are defined.

Raises:
    ValueError if any argument is None or empty string.

methods.name: pymess.backend.routers.BaseRouter.get_backend_name
documentation: Method should return name of the backend specified in PYMESS_*_BACKEND_ROUTER setting option

classes.name: pymess.backend.push.dummy.DummyPushNotificationBackend
documentation: Dummy push notification backend used for testing environments. Backend only logs messages to the database.

classes.name: pymess.backend.dialer.dummy.DummyDialerBackend
documentation: Dummy dialer backend used for testing environments. Backend only logs messages to the database.

functions.name: pymess.backend.push.send_template
documentation:
Helper for building and sending push notification message from a template.
\:param recipient: push notification recipient
\:param slug: slug of a push notification template
\:param context_data: dict of data that will be sent to the template renderer
\:param related_objects: list of related objects that will be linked with the push notification using generic

> relation

```
param tag

string mark that will be saved with the message

param send_immediately

publishes the message regardless of the  result

return

Push notification message object or None if template cannot be sent
```

functions.name: pymess.backend.push.send
documentation:
Helper for sending push notification.
\:param recipient: push notification recipient
\:param content: text content of the messages
\:param related_objects:
\:param tag: string mark that will be saved with the message
\:param kwargs: extra attributes that will be stored with messages
\:param send_immediately: publishes the message regardless of the `is_turned_on_batch_sending` result
\:return: True if push notification was successfully sent or False if message is in error state

classes.name: pymess.backend.push.PushNotificationController
documentation: Controller class for push notifications delegating message to correct push notification backend

classes.name: pymess.backend.sms.dummy.DummySMSBackend
documentation: Dummy SMS backend used for testing environments. Backend only logs messages to the database.

methods.name: pymess.backend.dialer.daktela.DaktelaDialerBackend._update_dialer_states
documentation:
Method uses Daktela API to get info about autodialer call status
\:param messages: list of dialer messages to update

methods.name: pymess.backend.dialer.daktela.DaktelaDialerBackend.publish_message
documentation:
Method uses Daktela API for sending dialer message
\:param message: dialer message
Dialer backend implementing Daktela service https://www.daktela.com/api/v6/models/campaignsrecords

functions.name: pymess.backend.dialer.send_template
documentation:
Helper for building and sending dialer message from a template.
\:param recipient: phone number of the recipient
\:param slug: slug of a dialer template
\:param context_data: dict of data that will be sent to the template renderer
\:param related_objects: list of related objects that will be linked with the dialer message using generic

> relation

```
param tag

string mark that will be saved with the message

param send_immediately

publishes the message regardless of the  result

return

dialer message object or None if template cannot be sent
```

functions.name: pymess.backend.dialer.send
documentation:
Helper for sending dialer message.
\:param recipient: phone number of the recipient
\:param content: text content of the messages
\:param related_objects:
\:param tag: string mark that will be saved with the message
\:param kwargs: extra attributes that will be stored with messages
\:param send_immediately: publishes the message regardless of the `is_turned_on_batch_sending` result
\:return: True if dialer was successfully sent or False if message is in error state

classes.name: pymess.backend.dialer.DialerController

methods.name: pymess.backend.dialer.DialerController.get_initial_dialer_state
documentation:
returns initial state for logged dialer instance.
\:param recipient: phone number of the recipient

methods.name: pymess.backend.dialer.DialerController.create_message
documentation:
Create dialer message which will be logged in the database (content is not needed for this).
\:param recipient: phone number of the recipient
\:param related_objects: list of related objects that will be linked with the dialer message using generic
relation
\:param tag: string mark that will be saved with the message
\:param template: template object from which content of the message was created
\:param is_autodialer: True if it's a autodialer call otherwise False
\:param priority: priority of sending message 1 (highest) to 3 (lowest)
\:param kwargs: extra attributes that will be saved with the message

methods.name: pymess.backend.dialer.DialerController.bulk_check_dialer_status
documentation: Method that finds messages that are not in the final state which were not sent and updates their states.
Controller class for dialer delegating message to correct dialer backend

classes.name: pymess.backend.dialer.DialerBackend

methods.name: pymess.backend.dialer.DialerBackend._update_dialer_states
documentation:
If dialer sender provides check dialer delivery this method can be overridden.
\:param messages: messages which state will be updated

Base class for dialer backend containing implementation of concrete dialer service that
is used for automatic call to selected phone number.

classes.name: pymess.backend.sms.twilio.TwilioSMSBackend

documentation: Connect to the twilio service

documentation:
Method uses twilio REST client for sending SMS message
\:param message: SMS message
SMS backend implementing twilio service https://www.twilio.com/

functions.name: pymess.backend.sms.send_template
documentation:
Helper for building and sending SMS message from a template.
\:param recipient: phone number of the recipient
\:param slug: slug of a SMS template
\:param context_data: dict of data that will be sent to the template renderer
\:param related_objects: list of related objects that will be linked with the SMS message using generic

> relation

```
param tag

string mark that will be saved with the message

return

SMS message object or None if template cannot be sent

param send_immediately

publishes the message regardless of the  result
```

functions.name: pymess.backend.sms.send
documentation:
Helper for sending SMS message.
\:param recipient: phone number of the recipient
\:param content: text content of the messages
\:param related_objects:
\:param tag: string mark that will be saved with the message
\:param kwargs: extra attributes that will be stored with messages
\:param send_immediately: publishes the message regardless of the `is_turned_on_batch_sending` result
\:return: True if SMS was successfully sent or False if message is in error state

classes.name: pymess.backend.sms.SMSController

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.SMSController.get_initial_sms_state
documentation:
returns initial state for logged SMS instance.
\:param recipient: phone number of the recipient

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.SMSController.create_message
documentation:
Create SMS which will be logged in the database.
\:param recipient: phone number of the recipient
\:param content: content of the SMS message
\:param related_objects: list of related objects that will be linked with the SMS message using generic
relation
\:param tag: string mark that will be saved with the message
\:param template: template object from which content of the message was created
\:param priority: priority of sending message 1 (highest) to 3 (lowest)
\:param kwargs: extra attributes that will be saved with the message

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.SMSController.bulk_check_sms_states
documentation: Method that find messages that is not in the final state and updates its states.
Controller class for SMS delegating message to correct SMS backend

classes.name: pymess.backend.sms.SMSBackend

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.SMSBackend.update_sms_states
documentation:
If SMS sender provides check SMS delivery this method can be overridden.
\:param messages: messages which state will be updated

Base class for SMS backend containing implementation of concrete SMS service that
is used for sending SMS messages.

classes.name: pymess.backend.sms.sns.SNSSMSBackend

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.sns.SNSSMSBackend._get_sns_client
documentation: Connect to the SNS service

documentation:
Method uses boto3 client via witch SMS message is send
\:param message: SMS message
SMS backend implementing AWS SNS service via boto3 library https://aws.amazon.com/sns/

classes.name: pymess.backend.emails.dummy.DummyEmailBackend
documentation: Dummy e-mail backend used for testing environments. Backend only logs messages to the database.

classes.name: pymess.backend.emails.mandrill.MandrillEmailBackend
documentation: E-mail backend implementing Mandrill service (https://mandrillapp.com/api/docs/index.python.html).

functions.name: pymess.backend.send_template
documentation:
Helper for building and sending message from a template.
\:param recipient: email or phone number of the recipient
\:param slug: slug of a template
\:param context_data: dict of data that will be sent to the template renderer
\:param related_objects: list of related objects that will be linked with the dialer message using generic

> relation

```
param tag

string mark that will be saved with the message

param template_model

template model instance

param kwargs

extra attributes that will be stored with message

return

dialer message object or None if template cannot be sent
```

functions.name: pymess.backend.send
documentation:
Helper for sending message.
\:param recipient: email or phone number of the recipient
\:param content: text content of the messages
\:param related_objects:
\:param tag: string mark that will be saved with the message
\:param kwargs: extra attributes that will be stored with messages
\:param message_controller: controller sender instance
\:return: True if message was successfully sent or False if message is in error state

classes.name: pymess.backend.BaseController

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseController.get_waiting_or_retry_messages
documentation: Return queryset of waiting messages to send

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseController.send
documentation:
Send message with the text content to the phone number (recipient)
\:param recipient: email or phone number of the recipient
\:param content: text content of the message
\:param related_objects: list of related objects that will be linked with the message using generic
relation
\:param tag: string mark that will be saved with the message
\:param template: template object from which content of the message was create
\:param send_immediately: publishes the message regardless of the `is_turned_on_batch_sending` result
\:param message_backend: message backend instance
\:param kwargs: extra attributes that will be stored to the message

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseController.get_batch_max_seconds_to_send
documentation: Return max timeout in seconds to send message

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseController.get_batch_size
documentation: Return number of messages sent in batch

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseController.create_message
documentation:
Create message which will be logged in the database.
\:param recipient: email or phone number of the recipient
\:param content: content of the message
\:param related_objects: list of related objects that will be linked with the message using generic
relation
\:param tag: string mark that will be saved with the message
\:param template: template object from which content of the message was created
\:param priority: priority of sending message 1 (highest) to 3 (lowest)
\:param kwargs: extra attributes that will be saved with the message

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseController.bulk_send_messages
documentation:
Sends more messages together. If concrete backend provides send more messages at once the method
can be overridden
\:param messages: list of messages

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseController.bulk_send
documentation:
Send more messages in one bulk
\:param recipients: list of emails or phone numbers of recipients
\:param content: text content of the messages
\:param related_objects: list of related objects that will be linked with the message using generic
relation
\:param tag: string mark that will be saved with the message
\:param template: template object from which content of the message was create
\:param kwargs: extra attributes that will be stored with messages

Base class of Controller. Any type of communication requires Controller derived from this class.
Many backends of the same type of communication can be supported by one controller which chooses the right backend
implementation based on the recipient

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseBackend._get_extra_sender_data
documentation: Gets arguments that will be saved with the message in the extra_sender_data field

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseBackend.get_extra_message_kwargs
documentation: Gets model message kwargs that will be saved with the message

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseBackend._update_message
documentation:
Method for updating state of the message
\:param message: message object
\:param extra_sender_data: extra data that will be saved to the extra_sender_data field
\:param kwargs: changed object kwargs

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseBackend._update_message_after_sending
documentation:
Method for updating state of the message after it was sent
\:param message: message object
\:param extra_sender_data: extra data that will be saved to the extra_sender_data field
\:param kwargs: changed object kwargs

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseBackend._update_message_after_sending_error
documentation:
Method for updating state of the message after it was send with error result
\:param message: message object
\:param extra_sender_data: extra data that will be saved to the extra_sender_data field
\:param state: error state of the message
\:param kwargs: changed object kwargs

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseBackend._set_message_as_failed
documentation:
Method for updating state of the message to the final error state
\:param message: message object
\:param kwargs: changed object kwargs

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseBackend.publish_message
documentation:
Send the message
\:param message: SMS message

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseBackend.publish_messages
documentation:
Send bulk of messages at once
\:param messages: list of SMS message

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseBackend.get_batch_max_number_of_send_attempts
documentation: Return number attempts to send message

methods.name: pymess.backend.BaseBackend.get_retry_sending
documentation: Return True if message should be retried if sending fails

classes.name: pymess.backend.sms.sms_operator.SMSOperatorBackend

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.sms_operator.SMSOperatorBackend._serialize_messages
documentation:
Serialize SMS messages to the XML
\:param messages: list of SMS messages
\:param request_type: type of the request to the SMS operator
\:return: serialized XML message that will be sent to the SMS operator service

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.sms_operator.SMSOperatorBackend._send_requests
documentation:
Performs the actual POST request for input messages and request type.
\:param messages: list of SMS messages
\:param request_type: type of the request
\:param is_sending: True if method is called after sending message
\:param change_sms_kwargs: extra kwargs that will be stored to the message object

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.sms_operator.SMSOperatorBackend._update_sms_states_from_response
documentation:
Higher-level function performing serialization of SMS operator requests, parsing ATS server response and
updating  SMS messages state according the received response.
\:param messages: list of SMS messages
\:param parsed_response: parsed HTTP response from the SMS operator service
\:param is_sending: True if update is called after sending message
\:param change_sms_kwargs: extra kwargs that will be stored to the message object

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.sms_operator.SMSOperatorBackend._parse_response_codes
documentation:
Finds all \<dataitem> tags in the given XML and returns a mapping "uniq" -> "response code" for all SMS.
In case of an error, the error is logged.
\:param xml: XML from the SMS operator response
\:return: dictionary with pair {SMS uniq: response status code}

SMS backend that implements ATS operator service https://www.sms-operator.cz/
Backend supports check SMS delivery

classes.name: pymess.backend.emails.smtp.SMTPEmailBackend
documentation: E-mail backend implementing standard SMTP service

classes.name: pymess.management.commands.check_dialer_status.Command
documentation: Command for checking dialer call status. Dialer backend must support it.

classes.name: pymess.management.commands.check_sms_delivery.Command
documentation: Command for checking SMS delivery. SMS backend must support it.

classes.name: pymess.management.commands.sync_emails.Command
documentation:
Command to synchronize e-mail bodies from directory.
Default templates remain the same. Variant B templates have the '_B' suffix.

classes.name: pymess.backend.sms.ats_sms_operator.ATSSMSBackend

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.ats_sms_operator.ATSSMSBackend._serialize_messages
documentation:
Serialize SMS messages to the XML
\:param messages: list of SMS messages
\:param request_type: type of the request to the ATS operator
\:return: serialized XML message that will be sent to the ATS service

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.ats_sms_operator.ATSSMSBackend._send_requests
documentation:
Performs the actual POST request for input messages and request type.
\:param messages: list of SMS messages
\:param request_type: type of the request
\:param is_sending: True if method is called after sending message
\:param change_sms_kwargs: extra kwargs that will be stored to the message object

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.ats_sms_operator.ATSSMSBackend._update_sms_states_from_response
documentation:
Higher-level function performing serialization of ATS requests, parsing ATS server response and updating
SMS messages state according the received response.
\:param messages: list of SMS messages
\:param parsed_response: parsed HTTP response from the ATS service
\:param is_sending: True if update is called after sending message
\:param change_sms_kwargs: extra kwargs that will be stored to the message object

methods.name: pymess.backend.sms.ats_sms_operator.ATSSMSBackend._parse_response_codes
documentation:
Finds all \<code> tags in the given XML and returns a mapping "uniq" -> "response code" for all SMS.
In case of an error, the error is logged.
\:param xml: XML from the ATL response
\:return: dictionary with pair {SMS uniq: response status code}

SMS backend that implements ATS operator service https://www.atspraha.cz/
Backend supports check SMS delivery

classes.name: pymess.management.commands.dump_emails.Command
documentation: Command dumps e-mails body to the HTML files inside directory. Every HTML file is named with e-mail slug.

functions.name: pymess.backend.emails.send_template
documentation:
Helper for building and sending e-mail message from a template.
\:param recipient: e-mail address of the receiver
\:param slug: slug of the e-mail template
\:param context_data: dict of data that will be sent to the template renderer
\:param related_objects: list of related objects that will be linked with the e-mail message with generic

> relation

```
param attachments

list of files that will be sent with the message as attachments

param tag

string mark that will be saved with the message

param send_immediately

publishes the message regardless of the  result

return

e-mail message object or None if template cannot be sent
```

functions.name: pymess.backend.emails.send
documentation:
Helper for sending e-mail message.
\:param sender: e-mail address of the sender
\:param recipient: e-mail address of the receiver
\:param subject: subject of the e-mail message
\:param content: content of the e-mail message
\:param pre_header: pre header of the e-mail message
\:param sender_name: friendly name of the sender
\:param related_objects: list of related objects that will be linked with the e-mail message with generic

> relation

```
param tag

string mark that will be saved with the message

param attachments

list of files that will be sent with the message as attachments

param send_immediately

publishes the message regardless of the  result

param message_backend

message backend instance (if not specified controller will choose the backend)

param kwargs

extra data that will be saved in JSON format in the extra_data model field

return

True if e-mail was successfully sent or False if e-mail is in error state
```

classes.name: pymess.backend.emails.EmailController

methods.name: pymess.backend.emails.EmailController.get_initial_email_state
documentation:
returns initial state for logged e-mail message.
\:param recipient: e-mail address of the recipient

methods.name: pymess.backend.emails.EmailController.create_message
documentation:
Create e-mail which will be logged in the database.
\:param sender: e-mail address of the sender
\:param sender_name: friendly name of the sender
\:param recipient: e-mail address of the receiver
\:param subject: subject of the e-mail message
\:param pre_header: pre header of the e-mail message
\:param content: content of the e-mail message
\:param related_objects: list of related objects that will be linked with the e-mail message using generic
relation
\:param tag: string mark that will be saved with the message
\:param template: template object from which content, subject and sender of the message was created
\:param attachments: list of files that will be sent with the message as attachments
\:param priority: priority of sending message 1 (highest) to 3 (lowest)
\:param kwargs: extra data that will be saved in JSON format in the extra_data model field
Controller class for E-mail delegating message to correct E-mail backend

classes.name: pymess.backend.emails.EmailBackend

methods.name: pymess.backend.emails.EmailBackend.pull_message_info
documentation:
Pull message info from email service and store into extra_sender_data
\:param message: Email message

Base class for E-mail backend containing implementation of e-mail service that
is used for sending messages.

functions.name: pymess.utils.html.raise_error_if_contains_banned_tags
documentation: Raises a `ValidationError` if a `html_body` contains banned tags or attributes. Otherwise returns the `html_body`.

documentation: Helper that returns django model class defined by string {app_label}.{model_name}

functions.name: pymess.config.get_sms_template_model

documentation: Function returns dialer template model defined in Pymess settings

documentation: Function returns push notification template model defined in Pymess settings

classes.name: pymess.config.Settings
documentation:
Pymess settings is loaded lazy like Django settings.
The reason is usability of override_settings decorator with tests
